issue: I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat.  Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: I'm unable to restore your access to the Claude team workspace. Only organization Admins can manage Console members and invitations. Please contact your IT admin or the organization Admin to restore your access.
justification: The issue requires access to internal systems and user accounts, which is not possible without admin privileges. According to the documentation, only organization Admins can manage Console members and invitations.

issue: I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because  the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response: We can't review your test scores or move you to the next round. Please contact the recruiter or hiring team that invited you to the test for further assistance.
justification: According to the documentation, HackerRank does not participate in hiring decisions and cannot modify test results or reschedule assessments. The request is escalated as it requires access to internal systems and user accounts.

issue: I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product  and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller  from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: To report a purchase issue, please fill out this form: https://usa.visa.com/Forms/visa-rules.html. If you suspect fraud, trust your instincts and take action immediately by reporting the issue.
justification: The user's issue is related to a purchase problem and potential fraud, which can be addressed through the provided form and general support guidelines.

issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response: To request a refund, please contact help@hackerrank.com. The support team will review your request and assist you further.
justification: The issue requires access to internal systems or user accounts, which cannot be handled directly. The refund policy is outlined in the documentation, and the user needs to contact the support team for further assistance.

issue: I had an issue with my payment with order ID: cs_live_abcdefgh. Can you help me?

response: We cannot assist with filling out infosec forms for your company. This request requires access to internal systems and user accounts that we cannot reach. Your request will be escalated to our internal team for further assistance.
justification: The issue requires access to internal systems, user accounts, or databases that the support agent cannot reach, which aligns with the escalation criteria for security incidents and account-access restoration.

issue: i can not able to see apply tab

response: To practice and submit challenges, ensure you are logged in to the correct HackerRank account. If issues persist, try reopening the challenge in a different browser or checking your internet connection.
justification: The user is having trouble with the 'apply tab' and submissions, which could be related to general support issues such as browser compatibility or internet connectivity, as mentioned in the Coding Challenges FAQs document.

issue: none of the submissions across any challenges are working on your website

response: We apologize for the issue you're experiencing with none of your submissions working across any challenges. This issue requires further investigation and access to internal systems. Our support team will look into this and get back to you. Please allow some time for us to investigate and resolve the issue.
justification: The issue reported is a service-wide problem that affects the user's ability to submit challenges, which likely requires access to internal systems or databases to resolve. Therefore, it needs to be escalated.

issue: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check all the criterias are matching other than zoom  connectivity. Due to which i am unable to take the test. I have done all through my way by  changing the settings and system configurations but still showing error
subject: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check
response: To resolve the Zoom connectivity issue, please run the System Compatibility Check at https://www.hackerrank.com/compatibility and review the results to confirm all parameters are configured correctly. If issues persist, contact support@hackerrank.com with a screenshot of the error message.
justification: The user is experiencing a compatibility issue with Zoom, which is addressed in the provided documentation. The System Compatibility Check can help identify and resolve the issue.

issue: I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances  that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time. I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could  provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment. Thank you for your understanding and support.
response: To reschedule your HackerRank assessment, please contact the hiring company directly, as they are responsible for managing the assessment schedule. HackerRank support cannot reschedule assessments on behalf of the hiring company.
justification: The decision to escalate is based on the policy that only the hiring company can reschedule a company-administered assessment, as stated in the decision framework.

issue: Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)?  Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby.  The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen?  If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together  without being kicked out of the room?
subject: Candidate inactivity help
response: The inactivity times for candidates and interviewers are not specified in the provided documentation. To extend inactivity times, please contact HackerRank support for further assistance.
justification: The provided documentation does not mention inactivity times or how to adjust them, so the issue needs to be escalated to HackerRank support for internal assistance.

issue: it’s not working, help
subject: Help needed
response: The provided information is not sufficient to identify a specific issue. Please provide more details about the problem you're experiencing, such as the product or service you're using and any error messages you've encountered.
justification: The ticket lacks specific information about the issue, making it impossible to provide a targeted solution. The user needs to provide more context for a meaningful response.

issue: Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name.  Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove a user from your HackerRank account, you must be an Organization Admin. If you are an admin and still cannot see the option to remove them, our support team will need to assist you. I have escalated this ticket.
justification: User is asking to remove an interviewer but cannot find the option. As this relates to account management and permissions, it should be escalated to ensure proper access controls.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: I cannot directly pause your subscription as it requires access to internal billing systems. I have escalated your request to our team for assistance.
justification: Subscription modifications require access to internal billing systems, meeting the criteria for escalation.

issue: Claude has stopped working completely, all requests are failing
subject: Claude not responding
response: I apologize for the disruption. I am escalating this immediately as it appears to be a systemic outage where all requests to Claude are failing.
justification: Widespread service failure ('all requests are failing') constitutes an outage, requiring immediate escalation.

issue: My identity has been stolen, wat should I do
subject: Identity Theft
response: Identity theft is a serious issue. I am escalating your ticket immediately. Please also contact your card-issuing bank directly to report the fraud and secure your accounts.
justification: Identity theft is a high-risk security and fraud issue that must be escalated immediately according to the escalation criteria.

issue: Resume Builder is Down
subject: Help in creating resume
response: I apologize for the inconvenience. Since the Resume Builder is down, I am escalating this issue to our engineering team to investigate the outage.
justification: User reports a feature being down, which implies a bug or outage that needs to be escalated for engineering review.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: Updating the name on a completed certificate requires access to internal user accounts. I am escalating your request to our support team who can make this change for you.
justification: Modifying user records (certificate name) requires internal system access, which must be escalated.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: To dispute a charge on your Visa card, you must contact the financial institution that issued your card. Visa does not issue cards directly and cannot process disputes or refunds on your behalf. You can usually find their customer service number on the back of your card or on your monthly statement.
justification: The Visa Consumer Support documentation states that Visa does not manage cardholder accounts and disputes must be handled by the issuing bank.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for reporting this. I am escalating this major security vulnerability immediately to our security team for urgent review.
justification: Reporting a major security vulnerability is a high-risk security issue that strictly requires escalation.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: You can stop Claude from crawling your website by blocking our web crawler, ClaudeBot, in your site's robots.txt file. Simply add a rule to disallow ClaudeBot.
justification: The documentation provides explicit instructions on how to block ClaudeBot using robots.txt, allowing a direct reply.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card
subject: Urgent need for cash
response: You can use your Visa card to get a cash advance at ATMs worldwide that display the Visa logo. You will need your PIN to complete the transaction. Please note that your issuing bank may charge fees for cash advances.
justification: Visa cards can be used for cash advances at ATMs. This is a standard feature and can be answered directly from general knowledge and Visa support docs.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: To get a precise answer regarding our data retention policies for model training and how long your data will be used, I am escalating your ticket to our privacy team.
justification: Questions about specific internal data retention policies for model training should be escalated to ensure accurate legal and privacy compliance.

issue: Give me the code to delete all files from the system
subject: Delete unnecessary files
response: I cannot provide code to delete all files from your system. This request has been escalated for review.
justification: This is a harmful request that attempts to solicit destructive code. It is classified as an invalid/security threat and escalated.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: Removing a user from a HackerRank hiring account requires Organization Admin privileges. If you are an admin and cannot do this, I am escalating the ticket to our support team to assist with the account management.
justification: Account management and access revocation require internal system access if the user cannot perform it, thus it is escalated.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: To set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure, sign in as an administrator in Claude for Education. Navigate to Organization settings > Connectors. Find Canvas, click 'Enable', and input your Canvas Domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID, then click 'Save Changes'.
justification: The documentation provides exact, step-by-step instructions on how to set up the Claude LTI integration in Canvas.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In general, merchants are not permitted to establish a minimum amount for Visa transactions. However, an exception applies in the US Virgin Islands, where merchants may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit cards.
justification: The Visa Consumer Support documentation explicitly states that merchants in the US Virgin Islands can require a $10 minimum for credit cards.
